mapper.sql: id, user_id, service_id, access_level, granted_by, reason, expire_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cas_app_access (user_id, service_id, access_level, granted_by, reason, expire_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{serviceId}, #{accessLevel}, #{grantedBy}, #{reason}, #{expireTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cas_app_access WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND service_id = #{serviceId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cas_app_access WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM cas_app_access WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY created_time DESC
